text.title: Gcp Resource Hierarchy Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gcp-resource-hierarchy methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: design-tree
step.action: Draft Folder per (BU × env); record naming convention.

step.name: provision
step.action: Create folders; move projects under them.

step.name: billing-assignment
step.action: Assign at folder level; remove project-level overrides.

step.name: policies
step.action: Bind cross-cutting org policies + IAM at folder.
